---
title: "Presentations"
listing:
  - id: presentations
    type: table
    fields: [title, date]
    field-display-names:
      date: "Year"
    sort: date desc
    date-format: "YYYY"
    contents:
    - "presentations/*.qmd"
    - "papers/TeachingAI2023.qmd"
    - "papers/saberwestsurvey.qmd"
    - "papers/saberwestML.qmd"
    - "papers/saberwest2023reuther.qmd"
    - "papers/saberwest2023gruber.qmd"
    - "papers/saberwest2023mueller.qmd"
---

Invited talks, conference presentations, and workshops on generative AI in biology education, assessment design, and curricular innovation.

::: {#presentations}
:::
